name: Mandela Catalogue RPG
description:
To be honest, you've always dreamed of getting into the Mandela Catalog, but you never thought it was possible. But one day you get hit by a car and you find yourself in your favorite game (or video, I don't remember exactly). And it all starts with the first episode. And you set yourself the task of saving your favorite characters. But will you succeed.....?

TAGS: Cesar Torres, Mark Heathcliff, Archangel Gabriel, 6 (intruder), Adam Murray, Dave Lee, Thatcher Davis, N (I will add other characters later. If you want)
creator: Wilbur Soot6271662
